REFERENCIÁK
Catalogs
Assistance service
An assistance service that provides technical support for our partners, from lighting design to the necessary product design and installation.
Environmentally conscious developments
Our company was the first in Hungary to use the IDA logo, which is the trademark of manufacturers who want to do something for a livable environment.
Light technology lab
We have a certified light technology laboratory that is unique in our country.
In addition to domestic measurement orders, it is also suitable for high-quality service of international needs.
Durable design
We place great emphasis on the quality and reliability of our products.
To check this, we have several different aging and mechanical stress simulating instruments.
years of professional experience
